name: Grilled Apple-Nut Stuffed Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the apple-nut stuffing by mixing bread crumbs, chopped apples, pecans, nutmeg, and salt.
2. Cut a deep pocket in each pork chop on the meatiest side of the bone.
3. Stuff about 1/3 cup of the prepared mixture into each pocket.
4. Secure the stuffed pork chops with toothpicks.
5. Mix melted margarine, orange juice, and additional nutmeg.
6. Grill the pork chops over medium-low coals for 40-45 minutes, brushing occasionally with the orange juice mix and turning 3-4 times.
7. Remove toothpicks when the pork is no longer pink in the center.
